property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-23\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python314\;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Player\bin\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Users\RAZACK\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Users\RAZACK\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\RAZACK\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\RAZACK\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\Oyun\Nouveau dossier\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.3.3\bin;;C:\Users\RAZACK\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: createPost_WithValidBody_ShouldReturn201
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": null, "userId": 1, "title": "Yazılım Test Mühendisliği", "body": "Bu test REST Assured ile yazılmıştır." } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Wed, 13 May 2026 13:43:50 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 129 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"81-skQ0Gbn9B+Pnz4KtfaV4I2KJAUw" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=74b9rfAuNEWqWEd0GUrHJ3Itg29rA2l6cJex4UtaC8M%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1778679830"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=74b9rfAuNEWqWEd0GUrHJ3Itg29rA2l6cJex4UtaC8M%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1778679830" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 999 x-ratelimit-reset: 1778679867 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fb2182a0a601c82-AMS alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": 101, "userId": 1, "title": "Yazılım Test Mühendisliği", "body": "Bu test REST Assured ile yazılmıştır." } ✅ TC-006 PASSED: Post oluşturuldu. ID=101. Yanıt süresi: 374ms

testcase.name: createPost_AllFieldsReflectedInResponse
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": null, "userId": 5, "title": "Otomasyon Test Projesi", "body": "Rest Assured kullanarak otomatik API testi yazıyoruz." } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Wed, 13 May 2026 13:43:51 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 135 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"87-UbLbEtuI4EqziDzHt3XzikdnykU" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fgqpOXs%2F67nJWjM0285GpgetG6s8Pl9AEcBGXMNiyjE%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1778679831"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fgqpOXs%2F67nJWjM0285GpgetG6s8Pl9AEcBGXMNiyjE%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1778679831" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 998 x-ratelimit-reset: 1778679867 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fb218305aacf95a-DUS alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": 101, "userId": 5, "title": "Otomasyon Test Projesi", "body": "Rest Assured kullanarak otomatik API testi yazıyoruz." } ✅ TC-007 PASSED: Tüm alanlar doğrulandı. Yanıt süresi: 883ms

testcase.name: createPost_WithRawJsonBody_ShouldReturn201
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "userId": 3, "title": "Rest Assured ile API Testi", "body": "Bu test ham JSON body kullanarak yazılmıştır." } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Wed, 13 May 2026 13:43:51 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 134 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"86-q69Eu/JyWVTeYZZfnkXut3tAjwQ" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fgqpOXs%2F67nJWjM0285GpgetG6s8Pl9AEcBGXMNiyjE%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1778679831"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fgqpOXs%2F67nJWjM0285GpgetG6s8Pl9AEcBGXMNiyjE%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1778679831" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 997 x-ratelimit-reset: 1778679867 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fb21832fb08d3f4-AMS alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "userId": 3, "title": "Rest Assured ile API Testi", "body": "Bu test ham JSON body kullanarak yazılmıştır.", "id": 101 } ✅ TC-008 PASSED: Ham JSON body ile post oluşturuldu. Yanıt süresi: 325ms

testcase.name: createPost_ResponseContentType_ShouldBeJson
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": null, "userId": 2, "title": "Header Test Postu", "body": "Content-Type doğrulama testi." } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Wed, 13 May 2026 13:43:52 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 106 Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-credentials: true access-control-expose-headers: Location Cache-Control: no-cache etag: W/"6a-hUOsEwG1bIP4qiAFhbHRmXQavn4" expires: -1 location: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/101 nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} pragma: no-cache report-to: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fgqpOXs%2F67nJWjM0285GpgetG6s8Pl9AEcBGXMNiyjE%3D\u0026sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d\u0026ts=1778679831"}],"max_age":3600} reporting-endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=fgqpOXs%2F67nJWjM0285GpgetG6s8Pl9AEcBGXMNiyjE%3D&sid=e11707d5-02a7-43ef-b45e-2cf4d2036f7d&ts=1778679831" Server: cloudflare vary: Origin, X-HTTP-Method-Override, Accept-Encoding via: 2.0 heroku-router x-content-type-options: nosniff x-powered-by: Express x-ratelimit-limit: 1000 x-ratelimit-remaining: 996 x-ratelimit-reset: 1778679867 cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC CF-RAY: 9fb21835abc6fead-AMS alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "id": 101, "userId": 2, "title": "Header Test Postu", "body": "Content-Type doğrulama testi." } ✅ TC-009 PASSED: POST response Content-Type doğrulandı. Yanıt süresi: 302ms
